candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line and identical to Net sales; suitable as top-line revenue priority item.
Not revenue; this is cost line.
Non-operating/special gain, not top-line revenue.

candidates.row_label: Accrued revenue from contracts with customers
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not income statement revenue.
Direct top-line sales label, identical values to Total Revenue; appropriate alternate revenue label.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list as allowed. Total Revenue is the clearest total top-line label; Net sales is included as alternate label over time.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales/services line with populated values; best match for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold and services
candidates.why: Semantically relevant but appears unpopulated in preview; less preferred than populated direct cost line.
Total cost of revenues line, identical to Cost of services sold; less preferred than underlying component wording.

variables.notes: Preferred component row over identical total/subtotal row 'Cost of Revenues - Total'.

candidates.why: Overhead/operating expense component, not a total.
Personnel cost overhead component, appropriate for SG&A components.
Overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A-type component excluding D&A and finance items.
Share-based compensation can be included in SG&A components.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A total row is present. Selected best overhead component rows and excluded COGS, D&A/amortization/impairment, interest, taxes, and totals/balancing rows.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best available match.

variables.notes: Explicit R&D line exists, so use it as priority item.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense total; useful fallback if specific interest expense is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest component, but only lease-related and not full interest expense.
Direct interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Residual finance expense, not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure; fallback only.

variables.notes: Using priority list per instructions. Prefer the direct line 'Interest Expenses'; use 'Financial expenses' as fallback if reporting label changes. Excluded lease-only interest lines from final priority because they are incomplete interest components.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner equity exists.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: TOTAL EQUITY AND LIABILITIES Financial instruments measured at fair value
candidates.why: Total assets/liabilities+equity row, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent/owner equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation item, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.
Income statement attribution within comprehensive income section, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful alternate over time.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as priority list. BE uses parent equity, so including MIB separately avoids double counting.
